basic_details.job_title: AP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 230 Anganwadi Worker & Helper Posts in Sri Satya Sai District
basic_details.organization_name: District Women Development & Child Welfare Office, Sri Satya Sai District, Andhra Pradesh Government
basic_details.post_name: Anganwadi Worker (AWW), Mini Anganwadi Worker, Anganwadi Helper (AWH)
basic_details.department: Women Development & Child Welfare Department (WD&SC), ICDS Projects
basic_details.job_location: Sri Satya Sai District, Andhra Pradesh (Various Villages/Mandals in Kadiri & Dharmavaram Divisions)
basic_details.short_information: The District Women Development & Child Welfare Office, Sri Satya Sai District, Andhra Pradesh Government has released the official Anganwadi Worker & Helper Recruitment 2026 Notification on 06 June 2026 at srisathyasai.ap.gov.in. A total of 230 vacancies have been announced under Notification No. 8849 for Anganwadi Worker (AWW), Mini Anganwadi Worker, and Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts. Eligible women candidates aged between 21 and 35 years with the prescribed educational qualification can apply through the offline mode by submitting their applications at the concerned ICDS Project Office within

important_dates.merit list / selection date: To be notified by the Collector, Sri Satya Sai District

application_fee.details: No application fee is charged. The application is free of cost for all categories.

age_limit.details: Age limit for all posts is between 21 to 35 years as on 01-07-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of Andhra Pradesh guidelines.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of application. Only Women candidates who are local residents (permanent residents) of the village/ward where the AWC is located are eligible. Candidates awaiting results of final examinations need not apply. | DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

salary_details.pay_scale: Anganwadi Worker (AWW): Rs. 11,500/- per month (honorarium); Anganwadi Helper (AWH): Rs. 7,000/- per month (honorarium) as per G.O.MS No. 13 WCD&SC (PROGS) dated 26/06/19

selection_process: Selection will be done purely on merit through the following process:

Step 1 – Document Submission: Candidates submit applications with all required documents at the ICDS Project office during the walk-in period (09-06-2026 to 18-06-2026). Step 2 – Document Verification: Applications are verified by the CDPO (Child Development Project Officer) at the project office. Candidates must also produce originals of all documents including TC/Study certificates

without which there will be no opportunity to submit them later. Step 3 – Merit List Preparation: Merit list is prepared based on marks obtained at the qualification level (10th class marks memo). Step 4 – Final Selection: Roster-point based selection; Collector

Sri Satya Sai District is the final authority. The vacancy details with final selection cannot be cancelled by the Collector. Interview: The CDPO will note whether the candidate is eligible or not eligible for the interview and affix the date

Reservation for PwBD: Reservations for roster points from the registration point for persons with disabilities are exempted as per the rules. The categories of disability that are exempted under child welfare regulations include 6th (anemia and low weight)
and multiple disabilities) roster points. Women with disabilities who are unable to perform home-visiting duties and do not have the ability to cook can also apply.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline only by walk-in. No postal applications or online applications are accepted. The application form can be downloaded from https://srisathyasai.ap.gov.in/ or collected from the ICDS Project office. Applications must be submitted at the concerned ICDS Project Office between 09-06-2026 and 18-06-2026 up to 5:00 PM only.

Applications must be submitted in the AWC (Anganwadi Centre) for which the vacancy exists, at the concerned ICDS Project Office. The application printed/written must have the photo affixed at the prescribed place with the candidate's signature over it. Internet/recent photograph not older than one month must be used.
Documents Required to be Enclosed with Application Form:
Recent passport-size photograph affixed at the prescribed place on the application form with signature over it
Proof of Local Residency - Nativity Certificate / Residence Certificate / Aadhaar Card (mandatory)
Marks Memo of 10th Class (SSC) qualification - self-attested copy (mandatory for age and merit calculation)
Caste Certificate (SC/ST/BC-A/BC-B/BC-C/BC-D/BC-E) - issued by Tahsildar, in the prescribed format (self-attested copy)
Disability Certificate - issued by the concerned Welfare Department branch office (if applicable)
Pre-School Training / Intermediate Board training / Creche & Pre-School Management Training / ICDS Worker certificate (if applicable, for additional weightage)
Marriage Certificate / Spouse details (if applicable, as AWW must be married)
Children's age proof documents (if applicable - candidate has young children)
Widow/Divorced status documents (if applicable) - gazette notified or issued by the competent authority
Any certificate not in Telugu or English must have an attested Hindi/English translation
For Kadiri Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, Kadiri
For Nallacheruvu Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, Nallacheruvu
For Dharmavaram Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, Dharmavaram
For Battalapalli Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, Battalapalli
For C.K. Palli Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, C.K. Palli
important_instructions: Only Women candidates who are permanent local residents of the village/ward where the AWC is located are eligible. This is a mandatory condition, not merely preferred. Candidates applying for Anganwadi Worker (AWW) or Mini Anganwadi Worker posts must be married and have a permanent residence and marital home (husband's village) in the same village/panchayat where the AWC exists. For Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts under SC and ST reserved vacancies, only SC and ST candidates respectively are eligible to apply - no other category candidate can apply for these seats. AWW/AWH appointments are governed by Government of AP rules and G.O.MS No. 13 WCD&SC (PROGS) dated 26/06/19 - honorarium (not regular salary) is paid as per rules. Vacancy details notified at present are final; the Collector, Sri Satya Sai District alone has authority to modify or cancel vacancies under unforeseen circumstances. Applications without photograph, without signature over the photograph, or without required documents will be summarily rejected without any communication. Candidates must submit their AP Open School Society (APOSS) TC/study certificates along with their application - no opportunity will be given to produce them later during CDPO screening. If a candidate has a disability, the disability proof must be issued by the concerned Welfare Department branch office - self-declarations are not accepted. Caste and residence certificates for SC/ST/BC categories must be issued by the Tahsildar and not by any other authority. Candidates must confirm on the application that they agree to serve in the specific AWC location applied for - transfers are generally not applicable for Anganwadi posts. All details provided in the application and the gazzetted officer-verified documents carry full legal responsibility on the candidate. For vacancy centre-wise details (AWC name, Mandal, Project, Roster Category), candidates must refer to the official notification PDF and apply only for the AWC vacancy that matches their local residence.

all_official_links.label: Download Sri Satya Sai District Anganwadi Worker & Helper Recruitment 2026 Notif

faq.question: Q1. Who can apply for Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 in Sri Satya Sai District?
faq.answer: Only women candidates who are permanent local residents of the specific village/ward where the Anganwadi Centre (AWC) vacancy exists can apply. Candidates must be between 21 and 35 years of age as on 01-07-2026 and must have passed 10th Class (SSC) from a recognized board. For AWW posts, candidates must also be married.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply and where should I submit my application?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application is 18-06-2026 by 5:00 PM. Applications must be submitted in person (walk-in) at the concerned ICDS Project Office (Kadiri / Nallacheruvu / Dharmavaram / Battalapalli / C.K. Palli) based on which project division the AWC vacancy belongs to. No postal or online applications are accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. There is absolutely no application fee for any category of candidates. The application process is completely free of cost.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary/honorarium for Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: As per G.O.MS No. 13 WCD&SC (PROGS) dated 26/06/2019, the honorarium payable is Rs. 11,500/- per month for Anganwadi Workers (AWW) and Rs. 7,000/- per month for Anganwadi Helpers (AWH). Note that this is an honorarium, not a regular government salary, but it is paid consistently by the State Government.

faq.question: Q5. How is the merit list prepared? Is there a written exam?
faq.answer: There is no written examination for Anganwadi posts. The merit list is prepared based on marks obtained in the 10th Class (SSC) qualification. Candidates with relevant training certificates (Pre-School training, ICDS worker training, Creche & Pre-School Management Training) may receive additional weightage as per government rules. Final selection is based on roster category and merit within each category.

faq.question: Q6. Can a woman from a neighbouring village apply for an AWC vacancy in a different village?
faq.answer: No. The candidate must be a permanent local resident of the specific village/ward where the AWC is located. Even if you live in a nearby village or the same panchayat, you are not eligible unless your permanent residence is in the exact village/ward of that AWC. This is strictly enforced.

faq.question: Q7. Can unmarried women apply for Anganwadi Worker posts?
faq.answer: For Anganwadi Worker (AWW) and Mini Anganwadi Worker posts, candidates should preferably be married as per the notification requirements. The candidate's permanent marital residence (husband's place) should ideally be in the same village as the AWC. Unmarried candidates should check the specific AWC vacancy instructions before applying.

faq.question: Q8. I belong to BC-B category. Can I apply for an OC (Open Category) AWC vacancy?
faq.answer: Yes. BC/SC/ST candidates who qualify on their own merit (without relaxed standards) can be accommodated against OC/Open Category vacancies as per the roster. However, you must check the specific Roster Category assigned to the AWC vacancy you are applying for (available in the vacancy list in the official notification). Each AWC vacancy has a specific roster category assigned and only candidates of that category can apply for that seat.

_backup_how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline only by walk-in. No postal applications or online applications are accepted. The application form can be downloaded from https://srisathyasai.ap.gov.in/ or collected from the ICDS Project office. Applications must be submitted at the concerned ICDS Project Office between 09-06-2026 and 18-06-2026 up to 5:00 PM only.

Applications must be submitted in the AWC (Anganwadi Centre) for which the vacancy exists, at the concerned ICDS Project Office. The application printed/written must have the photo affixed at the prescribed place with the candidate's signature over it. Internet/recent photograph not older than one month must be used.
Documents Required to be Enclosed with Application Form:
Recent passport-size photograph affixed at the prescribed place on the application form with signature over it
Proof of Local Residency - Nativity Certificate / Residence Certificate / Aadhaar Card (mandatory)
Marks Memo of 10th Class (SSC) qualification - self-attested copy (mandatory for age and merit calculation)
Caste Certificate (SC/ST/BC-A/BC-B/BC-C/BC-D/BC-E) - issued by Tahsildar, in the prescribed format (self-attested copy)
Disability Certificate - issued by the concerned Welfare Department branch office (if applicable)
Pre-School Training / Intermediate Board training / Creche & Pre-School Management Training / ICDS Worker certificate (if applicable, for additional weightage)
Marriage Certificate / Spouse details (if applicable, as AWW must be married)
Children's age proof documents (if applicable - candidate has young children)
Widow/Divorced status documents (if applicable) - gazette notified or issued by the competent authority
Any certificate not in Telugu or English must have an attested Hindi/English translation
For Kadiri Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, Kadiri
For Nallacheruvu Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, Nallacheruvu
For Dharmavaram Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, Dharmavaram
For Battalapalli Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, Battalapalli
For C.K. Palli Project vacancies: ICDS Project Office, C.K. Palli
